advanced_event_selector.description: Defines the configuration for advanced event selectors, specifying filtering rules to control which CloudTrail events are logged.
advanced_event_selector.type: list(object({name: optional(string),field_selector: list(object({ends_with: optional(list(string)),equals: optional(list(string)),field: string,not_ends_with: optional(list(string)),not_equals: optional(list(string)),not_starts_with: optional(list(string)),starts_with: optional(list(string))}))}))

cloud_watch_logs_group_arn.description: ARN of the CloudWatch Logs group to which CloudTrail logs will be delivered; must be in the same AWS region as the trail.

cloud_watch_logs_role_arn.description: ARN of the IAM role that allows CloudTrail to deliver events to CloudWatch Logs.

enable_log_file_validation.description: Indicates whether log file validation is enabled to ensure the integrity of CloudTrail log files.

enable_logging.description: Specifies whether logging is enabled for the CloudTrail to record API activity and events in the specified AWS account.

event_selector.description: Specifies configuration for logging read/write management events and data events, including resource ARNs and event types.

include_global_service_events.description: Determines whether global service events are included in the trail; must be true or false.

insight_selector.description: Specifies the configuration for selecting AWS CloudTrail Insights events, allowing monitoring of unusual activity.

is_multi_region_trail.description: Indicates whether the CloudTrail will log events across all regions in the AWS account.

is_organization_trail.description: Indicates whether the CloudTrail is an organization trail. Must be set to true for organization-wide logging.

kms_key_id.description: Specifies the KMS key ID to encrypt CloudTrail log files, ensuring secure log storage. Must be a valid KMS key ID associated with your AWS account.

name.description: Specifies the name of the CloudTrail. Must be unique within the AWS account.

s3_bucket_name.description: Name of the S3 bucket where CloudTrail logs will be stored; must already exist and be in the same AWS region as the trail.

s3_key_prefix.description: Specifies the S3 key prefix for the CloudTrail log files, used to organize logs within the S3 bucket.

sns_topic_name.description: Name of the SNS topic for delivering CloudTrail logs; must match an existing topic in the same AWS region.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to categorize and organize the resource, supporting metadata assignment and management.
